## Example DocumentReference: Example DocumentReference Consent Paperwork

Security Label: [test health data (Details: ActReason code HTEST = 'test health data')](http://terminology.hl7.org/7.2.0/CodeSystem-v3-ActReason.html)

**status**: Current

**type**: Release of information consent

**subject**: Martha (example patient)

**author**: Laboratoire de charme (example org)

**description**: The captured signed document

> **content**

### Attachments

| | | | |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| - | **ContentType** | **Data** | **Title** |
| * | text/plain | `` | Hello World |




## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "DocumentReference",
  "id" : "ex-documentreference1",
  "meta" : {
    "security" : [{
      "system" : "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActReason",
      "code" : "HTEST"
    }]
  },
  "status" : "current",
  "type" : {
    "coding" : [{
      "system" : "http://loinc.org",
      "code" : "64292-6",
      "display" : "Release of information consent"
    }]
  },
  "subject" : {
    "display" : "Martha (example patient)"
  },
  "author" : [{
    "display" : "Laboratoire de charme (example org)"
  }],
  "description" : "The captured signed document",
  "content" : [{
    "attachment" : {
      "contentType" : "text/plain",
      "data" : "",
      "title" : "Hello World"
    }
  }]
}

```
